item.title: 其实关于日本乡下土地，有太多的东西需要和人确认，沟通，wanman 目前已经有部分能力（发邮件，用 tuwa 打电话）一款林间空地，具体有多少棵树，哪些可以砍伐，哪些不能砍伐，砍伐后，如果需要安排植栽...

item.title: US schools & educational orgs: applications are NOW OPEN to host a live ham radio contact wi...
item.description:
US schools &amp; educational orgs: applications are NOW OPEN to host a live ham radio contact with an astronaut on the station.
🗓️ Contacts scheduled for Jan 1–June 30, 2027 ⏰ Proposals due May 22, 2026
Apply through @ARISS_Intl → https://t.co/TwHURDD7oU https://t.co/jSukvg9JAF

item.author: @elonmusk

item.title: cloudflare 刚扣了我上个月账单，7 美元，我看了下上个月我的所有 vibe 产品流量是 6M，用了将近 200GB 带宽，独立访问量 124万，竟然只用了 7 美元。。。
item.author: @turingou

item.title:
如果 AGI 存在的话，创业就只剩一个机会：就是疯狂去卷可能被 AI 覆盖的领域。比如 Lovart 卷图片的可编辑性、Lovable 卷 AI 生成应用的丰富性和可控性，等等。
如果 AGI 不存...
item.description:
如果 AGI 存在的话，创业就只剩一个机会：就是疯狂去卷可能被 AI 覆盖的领域。比如 Lovart 卷图片的可编辑性、Lovable 卷 AI 生成应用的丰富性和可控性，等等。
如果 AGI 不存在的话，那么创业就拥有无限机会。就和过往的 SaaS 在卷线下和传统软件一样。如果你认可 AI 时代，所有 SaaS 都值得重做一遍，那么你内心深处，其实是不相信 AGI 的。
如果你本身就不认可 AGI 这个概念，那么新世界的大门，就在你面前。
你是上面三种的哪一种。
--- @lifesinger | ❤️ 4 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 259
item.author: @lifesinger

item.title: Explore the beta Digital Ray here: https://t.co/k9lwT2tyPD and please give me feedback to make it be...
item.author: @RayDalio

item.title: Many people talk about Al as a threat, but l've always seen it as a partner to help me in my decisio...
item.description:
Many people talk about Al as a threat, but l've always seen it as a partner to help me in my decision making.
In 2017, I delivered this Ted Talk sharing a tool I had developed at Bridgewater: embedding our firm's decision-making principles into algorithms. My goal has always been to have an idea meritocracy in which there is meaningful work and meaningful relationships—a place where the best ideas win out over the human bias, emotion. and blind spots that often led us astray. This talk shows how AI helped achieve that.
That idea, which was radical at the time, is no longer a "future" concept. Whether you like it or not, algorithmic decision-making is coming at you fast, and it's going to change your life.
This is the foundation of my new AI twin, Digital Ray. Currently in beta, Digital Ray isn’t just a chatbot—it’s a system trained on decades of principles and pattern recognition, designed to think as I do. Consider it a tool to stress-test your own perspective for sharper, more confident choices.
https://t.co/PYQOmXl0Uk
--- @RayDalio | ❤️ 70 | 🔁 4 | 💬 15 | 👁 18434
item.author: @RayDalio
